code: import axios from'axios';const API_URL="".concat(process.env.REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL||'http://localhost:4000',"/api");const api=axios.create({baseURL:API_URL});api.interceptors.request.use(config=>{const token=localStorage.getItem('token');if(token){config.headers.Authorization="Bearer ".concat(token);}return config;});export default api;
